title: Tri-City College Prep High School ransomware incident

extortion.description: Tri-City College Prep High School ( established1999 ) - is a grade 9-12 High School in Prescott, Arizona. The school focuses on academics to prepare their students for college life. Tri-City College Prep High School is located in 5522 Side Rd, Prescott, Arizona, 86301, United States and has 24 employees. The total amount of data leakage is 1,2 GB
